record.field:
Dear ${object.manager1_id.name or ''},

Please approve resignation of the employee - ${object.employee_id.name} from Job Position ${object.job_id.name}.

  • Last working day : ${object.last_day_date} 
  • Branch : ${object.branch_id.name}
  • Department : ${object.department_id.name}
  • Link: https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.beta.resign.form&menu_id=1107&action=1490

Thank You

Dear ${object.manager1_id.name or ''},

Please approve resignation of the employee - ${object.employee_id.name} from Job Position ${object.job_id.name}.

  • Last working day : ${object.last_day_date} 
  • Branch : ${object.branch_id.name}
  • Department : ${object.department_id.name}
  • Link: https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.beta.resign.form&menu_id=1107&action=1490

Thank You

Dear Osama Aldaour,

Resignation request of employee - ${object.employee_id.name} from Job Position ${object.job_id.name} 

is Approved by ${object.approved_by.name} ,

Validated by ${object.fin_approved_by.name} 

and waiting for your Final Approval.

  • Last working day : ${object.last_day_date} 
  • Branch : ${object.branch_id.name}
  • Department : ${object.department_id.name}
  • Link: https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.beta.resign.form&menu_id=1107&action=1490

Thank You

Dear Osama Aldaour,

Resignation request of employee - ${object.employee_id.name} from Job Position ${object.job_id.name} 

is Approved by ${object.approved_by.name} ,

Validated by ${object.fin_approved_by.name} 

and waiting for your Final Approval.

  • Last working day : ${object.last_day_date} 
  • Branch : ${object.branch_id.name}
  • Department : ${object.department_id.name}
  • Link: https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.beta.resign.form&menu_id=1107&action=1490

Thank You

Dear Sageer,

Resignation request of employee - ${object.employee_id.name} from Job Position ${object.job_id.name} 

is Approved by ${object.approved_by.name} 

and waiting for your Validation (Second Approval).

  • Last working day : ${object.last_day_date} 
  • Branch : ${object.branch_id.name}
  • Department : ${object.department_id.name}
  • Link: https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.beta.resign.form&menu_id=1107&action=1490

Thank You

Dear Zaben,

Resignation request of employee - ${object.employee_id.name} from Job Position ${object.job_id.name} 

is Approved by ${object.approved_by.name} 

and waiting for your Validation (Second Approval).

  • Last working day : ${object.last_day_date} 
  • Branch : ${object.branch_id.name}
  • Department : ${object.department_id.name}
  • Link: https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.beta.resign.form&menu_id=1107&action=1490

Thank You

Dear HR Manager,

Resignation request of employee - ${object.employee_id.name} from Job Position ${object.job_id.name} 

is Approved by ${object.approved_by.name} 

and waiting for your Validation (Second Approval).

  • Last working day : ${object.last_day_date} 
  • Branch : ${object.branch_id.name}
  • Department : ${object.department_id.name}
  • Link: https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.beta.resign.form&menu_id=1107&action=1490

Thank You

Dear HR Manager,

Resignation request of employee - ${object.employee_id.name} from Job Position ${object.job_id.name} 

is Approved by ${object.approved_by.name} 

and waiting for your Validation (Second Approval).

  • Last working day : ${object.last_day_date} 
  • Branch : ${object.branch_id.name}
  • Department : ${object.department_id.name}
  • Link: https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.beta.resign.form&menu_id=1107&action=1490

Thank You

Dear Aslam,

Resignation request of employee - ${object.employee_id.name} from Job Position ${object.job_id.name} 

is Approved by ${object.approved_by.name} ,

Validated by ${object.fin_approved_by.name} 

and waiting for your Final Approval.

  • Last working day : ${object.last_day_date} 
  • Branch : ${object.branch_id.name}
  • Department : ${object.department_id.name}
  • Link: https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.beta.resign.form&menu_id=1107&action=1490

Thank You

Dear IT Department,

Our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} has resigned and the last working day will be ${object.last_day_date} . We need you to do the following:

    1. Retrieve all IT assets give to him (Laptop, PC, etc.)
    2. Retrieve the attendance access cards and cancel his door access
    3. Cancel his Office 365 access and forward his/her email as an alias to his manager - ${object.manager1_id.name} 
    4. Make sure that he/she has no access to any of our IT systems (cloud or on prem)
    5. Make sure he/she has no access to any of our physical offices, warehouse, etc.
    
Dear Administration Team,

Once the IT Team is done, we need you to kindly Approve this on the system using the following link :
Link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.beta.resign.form&menu_id=1107&action=1490
    
Thank You

Dear Aslam,

Our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} has resigned and the last working day will be ${object.last_day_date} . We need you to do the following:

    1. Make sure Email Address Disabled?
    2. Make sure Azure Active Directory User Disabled?
    3. Make sure Laptop Formatted (Sanitized)?
    4. Make sure Physical Access Revoked
    5. Make sure Lab Access Revoked
    
Dear Administration Team,

Once the CS Team is done, we need you to kindly Approve this on the system using the following link :
Link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.beta.resign.form&menu_id=1107&action=1490
    
Thank You

Dear CS Department,

Our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} has resigned and the last working day will be ${object.last_day_date} . We need you to do the following:

    1. Make sure Email Address Disabled?
    2. Make sure Azure Active Directory User Disabled?
    3. Make sure Laptop Formatted (Sanitized)?
    4. Make sure Physical Access Revoked
    5. Make sure Lab Access Revoked
    
Dear Administration Team,

Once the CS Team is done, we need you to kindly Approve this on the system using the following link :
Link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.beta.resign.form&menu_id=1107&action=1490
    
Thank You

Dear Team, 

This is to inform you about the resignation of our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} (National ID: ${object.employee_id.identification_id}) with his/her last working day being ${object.last_day_date} . Kindly note that he/she has an outstanding personal loan with the bank. 

Kindly inform the bank by pressing the Notify Bank button in ERP resignation form. 

  • Link: https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.beta.resign.form&menu_id=1107&action=1490

Thank you

Dear Team, 

This is to inform you about the resignation of our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} (National ID: ${object.employee_id.identification_id}) with his/her last working day being ${object.last_day_date} . Kindly note that he/she has an outstanding personal loan with the bank. 

Kindly inform the bank by pressing the Notify Bank button in ERP resignation form. 

  • Link: https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.beta.resign.form&menu_id=1107&action=1490

Thank you

Dear Team at ${object.l_bank_id.name}, 

Greetings from Dar Beta for Information Technology. We hope this message finds you well. 
 
We are writing to inform you of the resignation of our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} ( National ID: ${object.employee_id.identification_id} ) with his/her last working day being ${object.last_day_date} . Kindly note that he/she has an outstanding personal loan with your bank. 
 
We would appreciate your guidance on the process for transferring the loan clearance to his/her ${object.l_bank_id.name} account. 

Should you require any further information or assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us. 
 

Best regards, 
HR Team 
Dar Beta for Information Technology

Dear Team at ${object.l_bank_id.name},

Greetings from Dar Beta for Information Technology. We hope this message finds you well.
 
We are writing to inform you of the resignation of our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} (National ID: ${object.employee_id.identification_id}) with his/her last working day being ${object.last_day_date}. Kindly note that he/she has an outstanding personal loan with your bank.
 
We would appreciate your guidance on the process for transferring the loan clearance to his/her ${object.l_bank_id.name} account.

Should you require any further information or assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us.
 

Best regards,
HR Team
Dar Beta for Information Technology
السادة في ${object.l_bank_id.name_ar}         سلمهم الله, 

تهديكم شركة دار بيتا لتكنولوجيا المعلومات أطيب التحايا متمنين لكم موفور الصحة والعافية.
 
ونفيدكم  بانتهاء العلاقة التعاقدية مع الموظف - 
${object.employee_id.name}
هوية وطنية رقم : 
${object.employee_id.identification_id}
على أن يكون آخر يوم عمل له هو
${object.last_day_date}
 
ونحيطكم علماً بأن السجلات الخاصة بنا تفيد بوجود قرض شخصي للموظف ملزم لكم,, نأمل تأكيدكم ليتم تحويل المخالصة على الحساب البنكي الخاص به لدى ${object.l_bank_id.name_ar}.

إذا كنتم بحاجة إلى أي معلومات أو مساعدة إضافية، فلا تترددوا في الاتصال بنا.

مع أطيب التحيات
فريق الموارد البشرية
دار بيتا لتكنولوجيا المعلومات

Dear Team at ${object.l_bank_id.name}, 

Greetings from Dar Beta for Information Technology. We hope this message finds you well. 
 
Attached is the summary of dues for our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} ( National ID: ${object.employee_id.identification_id} ) with his/her last working day being ${object.last_day_date} . Kindly note that the total amount of dues is XXXX Saudi Riyals with the expected transfer date being XXXXX.

We would appreciate your guidance on the process for transferring the loan clearance to his/her ${object.l_bank_id.name} account. 

Thank you very much for your attention to this matter. 

Best regards, 
HR Team 
Dar Beta for Information Technology

Peace be upon you and God's mercy and blessings.

Dears at ${object.l_bank_id.name},
 
Attached is the clearance for employee ${object.employee_id.name}. Please note that her total dues amount to: ${'{0:,.2f}'.format(object.amount_to_pay or 0.0)} SAR. The expected date for the transfer of dues is (DD/MM/YYYY).
 
Thank you.
السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

السادة في / ${object.l_bank_id.name_ar} تحية طيبة
 
مرفق لكم مخالصة الموظفة
${object.employee_id.name}
علما بأن مبلغ مستحقاتها هو:
${'{0:,.2f}'.format(object.amount_to_pay or 0.0)}
سعودي. وتاريخ تحويل المستحقات المتوقع: الخميس الموافق
(DD/MM/YYYY)
 

ولكم جزيل الشكر

Dear Aslam,

Resignation request of employee - ${object.employee_id.name} from Job Position ${object.job_id.name} 

is Approved by ${object.approved_by.name} ,

Validated by ${object.fin_approved_by.name} 

and waiting for your Final Approval.

  • Last working day : ${object.last_day_date} 
  • Branch : ${object.branch_id.name}
  • Department : ${object.department_id.name}
  • Link: https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.beta.resign.form&menu_id=1107&action=1490

Thank You

Dear IT Department,

Our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} has terminated and the last working day will be ${object.last_day_date} . We need you to do the following:

    1. Retrieve all IT assets give to him (Laptop, PC, etc.)
    2. Retrieve the attendance access cards and cancel his door access
    3. Cancel his Office 365 access and forward his/her email as an alias to his manager - ${object.manager1_id.name} 
    4. Make sure that he/she has no access to any of our IT systems (cloud or on prem)
    5. Make sure he/she has no access to any of our physical offices, warehouse, etc.
    
Dear Administration Team,

Once the IT Team is done, we need you to kindly Approve this on the system using the following link :
https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=model=od.beta.terminate.form&menu_id=1108&action=1503
 
Thank You

Dear CS Department,

Our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} has terminated and the last working day will be ${object.last_day_date} . We need you to do the following:

    1. Make sure Email Address Disabled?
    2. Make sure Azure Active Directory User Disabled?
    3. Make sure Laptop Formatted (Sanitized)?
    4. Make sure Physical Access Revoked
    5. Make sure Lab Access Revoked
    
Dear Administration Team,

Once the CS Team is done, we need you to kindly Approve this on the system using the following link :
Link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.beta.resign.form&menu_id=1107&action=1490
    
Thank You

Dear CS Department,

Our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} has terminated and the last working day will be ${object.last_day_date} . We need you to do the following:

    1. Make sure Email Address Disabled?
    2. Make sure Azure Active Directory User Disabled?
    3. Make sure Laptop Formatted (Sanitized)?
    4. Make sure Physical Access Revoked
    5. Make sure Lab Access Revoked
    
Dear Administration Team,

Once the CS Team is done, we need you to kindly Approve this on the system using the following link :
Link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.beta.resign.form&menu_id=1107&action=1490
    
Thank You

Dear HR Manager,

Termination request of employee - ${object.employee_id.name} from Job Position ${object.job_id.name} 

is Approved by ${object.approved_by.name} 

and waiting for your Validation (Second Approval).

  • Last working day : ${object.last_day_date} 
  • Branch : ${object.branch_id.name}
  • Department : ${object.department_id.name}
  • Link: https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.beta.terminate.form&menu_id=1108&action=1503

Thank You

Dear HR Manager,

Termination/End of Contract request of employee - ${object.employee_id.name} from Job Position ${object.job_id.name} 

is Approved by ${object.gm_approved_by.name} 

and waiting for your Validation.

  • Last working day : ${object.last_day_date} 
  • Branch : ${object.branch_id.name}
  • Department : ${object.department_id.name}
  • Link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.beta.terminate.form&menu_id=1108&action=150354

Thank You

Dear Team, 

This is to inform you about the resignation of our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} (National ID: ${object.employee_id.identification_id}) with his/her last working day being ${object.last_day_date} . Kindly note that he/she has an outstanding personal loan with the bank. 

Kindly inform the bank by pressing the Notify Bank button in ERP resignation form. 

  • Link: https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.beta.terminate.form&menu_id=1108&action=1503

Thank you

Dear Team, 

This is to inform you about the resignation of our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} (National ID: ${object.employee_id.identification_id}) with his/her last working day being ${object.last_day_date} . Kindly note that he/she has an outstanding personal loan with the bank. 

Kindly inform the bank by pressing the Notify Bank button in ERP resignation form. 

  • Link: https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.beta.terminate.form&menu_id=1108&action=1503

Thank you

Dear Team at ${object.l_bank_id.name}, 

Greetings from Dar Beta for Information Technology. We hope this message finds you well. 
 
We are writing to inform you of the resignation of our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} ( National ID: ${object.employee_id.identification_id} ) with his/her last working day being ${object.last_day_date} . Kindly note that he/she has an outstanding personal loan with your bank. 
 
We would appreciate your guidance on the process for transferring the loan clearance to his/her ${object.l_bank_id.name} account. 

Should you require any further information or assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us. 
 

Best regards, 
HR Team 
Dar Beta for Information Technology

Dear Team at ${object.l_bank_id.name},

Greetings from Dar Beta for Information Technology. We hope this message finds you well.
 
We are writing to inform you of the resignation of our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} (National ID: ${object.employee_id.identification_id}) with his/her last working day being ${object.last_day_date}. Kindly note that he/she has an outstanding personal loan with your bank.
 
We would appreciate your guidance on the process for transferring the loan clearance to his/her ${object.l_bank_id.name} account.

Should you require any further information or assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us.
 

Best regards,
HR Team
Dar Beta for Information Technology

تهديكم شركة دار بيتا لتكنولوجيا المعلومات أطيب التحايا متمنين لكم موفور الصحة والعافية.
 
ونفيدكم  بانتهاء العلاقة التعاقدية مع الموظف -

هوية وطنية رقم :

على أن يكون آخر يوم عمل له هو

ونحيطكم علماً بأن السجلات الخاصة بنا تفيد بوجود قرض شخصي للموظف ملزم لكم,, نأمل تأكيدكم ليتم تحويل المخالصة على الحساب البنكي الخاص به لدى ${object.l_bank_id.name_ar}.

دار بيتا لتكنولوجيا المعلومات

Dear Team at ${object.l_bank_id.name}, 

Greetings from Dar Beta for Information Technology. We hope this message finds you well. 
 
Attached is the summary of dues for our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} ( National ID: ${object.employee_id.identification_id} ) with his/her last working day being ${object.last_day_date} . Kindly note that the total amount of dues is XXXX Saudi Riyals with the expected transfer date being XXXXX.

We would appreciate your guidance on the process for transferring the loan clearance to his/her ${object.l_bank_id.name} account. 

Thank you very much for your attention to this matter. 

Best regards, 
HR Team 
Dar Beta for Information Technology

Peace be upon you and God's mercy and blessings.

Dears at ${object.l_bank_id.name},
 
Attached is the clearance for employee ${object.employee_id.name}. Please note that her total dues amount to: ${'{0:,.2f}'.format(object.amount_to_pay or 0.0)} SAR. The expected date for the transfer of dues is (DD/MM/YYYY).
 
Thank you.
السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

السادة في / ${object.l_bank_id.name_ar} تحية طيبة
 
مرفق لكم مخالصة الموظفة
${object.employee_id.name}
علما بأن مبلغ مستحقاتها هو:
${'{0:,.2f}'.format(object.amount_to_pay or 0.0)}
سعودي. وتاريخ تحويل المستحقات المتوقع: الخميس الموافق
(DD/MM/YYYY)
 

ولكم جزيل الشكر
KSA - End of Contract IT Approval

Dear IT Department,

Our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} has terminated his contract and the last working day will be ${object.last_day_date} . We need you to do the following:

    1. Retrieve all IT assets give to him (Laptop, PC, etc.)
    2. Retrieve the attendance access cards and cancel his door access
    3. Cancel his Office 365 access and forward his/her email as an alias to his manager - ${object.manager1_id.name} 
    4. Make sure that he/she has no access to any of our IT systems (cloud or on prem)
    5. Make sure he/she has no access to any of our physical offices, warehouse, etc.
    
Dear Administration Team,

Once the IT Team is done, we need you to kindly Approve this on the system using the following link :

https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=end.of.contract&menu_id=1193&action=1854
 
Thank You
KSA - End of Contract CS Approval

Dear CS Department,

Our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} has terminated his contract and the last working day will be ${object.last_day_date} . We need you to do the following:

    1. Make sure Email Address Disabled?
    2. Make sure Azure Active Directory User Disabled?
    3. Make sure Laptop Formatted (Sanitized)?
    4. Make sure Physical Access Revoked
    5. Make sure Lab Access Revoked
    
Dear Administration Team,

Once the CS Team is done, we need you to kindly Approve this on the system using the following link :
Link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=end.of.contract&menu_id=1193&action=1854
    
Thank You
KSA - End of Contract Second Approval

Dear Mr. Osama Aldour,

We require your kind Approval for the Termination/End of Contract request of employee - ${object.employee_id.name} from Job Position ${object.job_id.name}

  • Last working day : ${object.last_day_date} 
  • Branch : ${object.branch_id.name}
  • Department : ${object.department_id.name}
  • Link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=end.of.contract&menu_id=1193&action=1854

Thank You
KSA - End of Contract Notification Finance

Dear Finance Team,

Termination/End of Contract request of employee - ${object.employee_id.name} from Job Position ${object.job_id.name} 

is Approved by ${object.approved_by.name} 

and waiting for your Approval.

  • Last working day : ${object.last_day_date} 
  • Branch : ${object.branch_id.name}
  • Department : ${object.department_id.name}
  • Link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=end.of.contract&menu_id=1193&action=1854

Thank You
KSA - End of Contract Notification HR

Dear HR Manager,

Termination/End of Contract request of employee - ${object.employee_id.name} from Job Position ${object.job_id.name} 

is Approved by ${object.gm_approved_by.name} 

and waiting for your Validation.

  • Last working day : ${object.last_day_date} 
  • Branch : ${object.branch_id.name}
  • Department : ${object.department_id.name}
  • Link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=end.of.contract&menu_id=1193&action=1854

Thank You
KSA - End of Contract Notification to Bank

Dear Team, 

This is to inform you about the resignation of our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} (National ID: ${object.employee_id.identification_id}) with his/her last working day being ${object.last_day_date} . Kindly note that he/she has an outstanding personal loan with the bank. 

Kindly inform the bank by pressing the Notify Bank button in ERP resignation form. 

  • Link: https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=end.of.contract&menu_id=1193&action=1854

Thank you
KSA - End of Contract Notification to Bank

Dear Team, 

This is to inform you about the resignation of our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} (National ID: ${object.employee_id.identification_id}) with his/her last working day being ${object.last_day_date} . Kindly note that he/she has an outstanding personal loan with the bank. 

Kindly inform the bank by pressing the Notify Bank button in ERP resignation form. 

  • Link: https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=end.of.contract&menu_id=1193&action=1854

Thank you
KSA - End of Contract Notification to Bank

Dear Team at ${object.l_bank_id.name}, 

Greetings from Dar Beta for Information Technology. We hope this message finds you well. 
 
We are writing to inform you of the resignation of our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} ( National ID: ${object.employee_id.identification_id} ) with his/her last working day being ${object.last_day_date} . Kindly note that he/she has an outstanding personal loan with your bank. 
 
We would appreciate your guidance on the process for transferring the loan clearance to his/her ${object.l_bank_id.name} account. 

Should you require any further information or assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us. 
 

Best regards, 
HR Team 
Dar Beta for Information Technology
KSA - End of Contract Notification to Bank

Dear Team at ${object.l_bank_id.name},

Greetings from Dar Beta for Information Technology. We hope this message finds you well.
 
We are writing to inform you of the resignation of our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} (National ID: ${object.employee_id.identification_id}) with his/her last working day being ${object.last_day_date}. Kindly note that he/she has an outstanding personal loan with your bank.
 
We would appreciate your guidance on the process for transferring the loan clearance to his/her ${object.l_bank_id.name} account.

Should you require any further information or assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us.
 

Best regards,
HR Team
Dar Beta for Information Technology
السادة في ${object.l_bank_id.name_ar}         سلمهم الله, 

تهديكم شركة دار بيتا لتكنولوجيا المعلومات أطيب التحايا متمنين لكم موفور الصحة والعافية.
 
ونفيدكم  بانتهاء العلاقة التعاقدية مع الموظف - 
${object.employee_id.name}
هوية وطنية رقم : 
${object.employee_id.identification_id}
على أن يكون آخر يوم عمل له هو
${object.last_day_date}
 
ونحيطكم علماً بأن السجلات الخاصة بنا تفيد بوجود قرض شخصي للموظف ملزم لكم,, نأمل تأكيدكم ليتم تحويل المخالصة على الحساب البنكي الخاص به لدى ${object.l_bank_id.name_ar}.

إذا كنتم بحاجة إلى أي معلومات أو مساعدة إضافية، فلا تترددوا في الاتصال بنا.

مع أطيب التحيات
فريق الموارد البشرية
دار بيتا لتكنولوجيا المعلومات
Notice of Employee End of Contract - ${object.employee_id.name}

Dear Team at ${object.l_bank_id.name}, 

Greetings from Dar Beta for Information Technology. We hope this message finds you well. 
 
Attached is the summary of dues for our employee - ${object.employee_id.name} ( National ID: ${object.employee_id.identification_id} ) with his/her last working day being ${object.last_day_date} . Kindly note that the total amount of dues is XXXX Saudi Riyals with the expected transfer date being XXXXX.

We would appreciate your guidance on the process for transferring the loan clearance to his/her ${object.l_bank_id.name} account. 

Thank you very much for your attention to this matter. 

Best regards, 
HR Team 
Dar Beta for Information Technology
Notice of Employee End of Contract - ${object.employee_id.name}

Peace be upon you and God's mercy and blessings.

Dears at ${object.l_bank_id.name},
 
Attached is the clearance for employee ${object.employee_id.name}. Please note that her total dues amount to: ${'{0:,.2f}'.format(object.amount_to_pay or 0.0)} SAR. The expected date for the transfer of dues is (DD/MM/YYYY).
 
Thank you.
السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

السادة في / ${object.l_bank_id.name_ar} تحية طيبة
 
مرفق لكم مخالصة الموظفة
${object.employee_id.name}
علما بأن مبلغ مستحقاتها هو:
${'{0:,.2f}'.format(object.amount_to_pay or 0.0)}
سعودي. وتاريخ تحويل المستحقات المتوقع: الخميس الموافق
(DD/MM/YYYY)
 

ولكم جزيل الشكر
